cases.title: Eligibility evaluator returns Eligible when Attended and mandatory feedback submitted
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired true in rule config
Registration in Attended state for valid participant
Feedback row exists linked to registrationId
steps: Call evaluateEligibilityRules(registration, event, feedback) with Attended registration and present feedback
cases.expected: Returns result Eligible with reasonCode ELIGIBLE and non-empty reasonText; satisfies BR-17 attendance baseline and BR-18 mandatory feedback rule

cases.title: Eligibility evaluator returns Eligible for Attended participant when feedback is optional
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired false in rule config
Registration in Attended state
No feedback row for the registration
steps: Call evaluateEligibilityRules(registration, event, null) with optional-feedback configuration
cases.expected: Returns result Eligible with reasonCode ELIGIBLE and reasonText; optional feedback does not block eligibility per workflow E

cases.title: getMyEligibility persists Eligible result with reason after feedback submission
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant and active feedback window
Participant submitted feedback via feedbackService.submit
Authenticated Participant actor for own registration
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility(eventId, participantId, participantContext)
Query certificate_eligibilities row by registrationId
cases.expected: Response result is Eligible with reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt; persisted row matches evaluation output in one transaction per module contract

cases.title: Flow A GET eligibility/me returns Eligible with reason after full lifecycle
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in, event completion, and feedback submission
Participant JWT from prior flow steps
Event configured with mandatory feedback
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant Authorization bearer token
Parse response payload fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with result Eligible, non-empty reasonCode, and non-empty reasonText; completes Flow A eligibility step per testing plan scenario matrix

cases.title: getMyEligibility returns NotEligible when mandatory feedback is missing
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired true
Participant registration in Attended state with no feedback submission
Authenticated Participant actor
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility(eventId, participantId, participantContext)
cases.expected: Response result is NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK and explanatory reasonText; outcome persisted with reason per BR-19

cases.title: Participant eligibility result panel shows Eligible or NotEligible with reason
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on a Completed event
Eligibility evaluation has run (via API or prior navigation)
Participation history or event detail exposes eligibility result panel
steps: Navigate to participation history or event detail eligibility section
Observe displayed eligibility status and reason text or tags
cases.expected: UI shows terminal result Eligible or NotEligible (not PendingEvaluation) with human-readable reason per Flow 5 and eligibility result panel spec

cases.title: Absent registration evaluates to NotEligible with attendance reason
preconditions: Completed event with any feedback configuration
Registration in Absent state (post event completion finalization)
Feedback may or may not exist
steps: Call evaluateEligibilityRules with Absent registration state
cases.expected: Returns result NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE; attendance rule fails before feedback checks

cases.title: Evaluation order checks attendance before mandatory feedback
preconditions: Event with feedbackRequired true
Registration not in Attended state (e.g. Absent or Registered)
No feedback submitted
steps: Call evaluateEligibilityRules with non-Attended registration and null feedback
cases.expected: Returns NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE (not NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK); deterministic rule order per validation rules section 5

cases.title: Attended participant without check-in finalization path still requires Attended state
preconditions: Completed event
Registration still in CheckedIn or Registered state (not yet finalized to Attended/Absent)
steps: Attempt eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for participant whose registration is not in Attended or Absent
cases.expected: Returns 404 NOT_FOUND (no eligible registration holder for evaluation) or equivalent guard; eligibility not computed until attendance is finalized per domain lifecycle

cases.title: GET eligibility/me for participant without Attended/Absent registration returns not found
preconditions: Published event with participant Registered but event not yet completed to Attended/Absent
Participant JWT for that registration
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant token before attendance finalization
cases.expected: HTTP 404 with NOT_FOUND error code; no Eligible/NotEligible payload returned prematurely

cases.title: Repeated eligibility evaluation refreshes stored result when inputs change
preconditions: Completed event with mandatory feedback and Attended participant
Initial getMyEligibility returned NotEligible (no feedback)
Participant subsequently submits feedback within window
steps: Call getMyEligibility before feedback (observe NotEligible)
Submit feedback
Call getMyEligibility again
cases.expected: Second evaluation returns Eligible and persists updated certificate_eligibilities row with new evaluatedAt; prior NotEligible row superseded per refresh policy

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET eligibility/me returns 401
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility records
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; no eligibility data leaked

cases.title: Participant cannot retrieve another participant's eligibility via scoped endpoint
preconditions: Completed event with two Attended participants A and B
Eligibility evaluated for both
Authenticated as participant A
steps: Call getMyEligibility scoped to participant A's identity only (service enforces actor.sub)
cases.expected: Returns only participant A's eligibility; no cross-participant data exposure; actor scope enforced per permission matrix

cases.title: Concurrent getMyEligibility calls produce consistent terminal result
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant and submitted mandatory feedback
Fixed inputs across parallel requests
steps: Issue multiple concurrent getMyEligibility calls for the same participant and event
Compare persisted certificate_eligibilities rows
cases.expected: All calls return same result Eligible with consistent reasonCode; no duplicate conflicting rows; evaluation is idempotent under concurrency

cases.title: Eligibility rule evaluation is deterministic for identical inputs
preconditions: Fixed registration, event rule config, and feedback fixtures
Deterministic test controls per testing plan section 7
steps: Run evaluateEligibilityRules twice with identical inputs
Compare result, reasonCode, and reasonText
cases.expected: Both invocations return identical result and reason fields; satisfies validation rules section 5 determinism requirements and scenario matrix 'deterministic with reason'

cases.title: Every eligibility evaluation persists non-empty reason code and text
preconditions: Completed event with Attended and Absent participants
Mix of feedback-complete and feedback-missing registrations
steps: Evaluate eligibility for Eligible and NotEligible scenarios via getMyEligibility
Inspect persisted certificate_eligibilities rows and API responses
cases.expected: All terminal outcomes include non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; INV-05 and BR-19 satisfied; assertEvaluationHasReason guard never triggers on valid paths

cases.title: Eligibility evaluation and persistence occur in one atomic transaction
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant ready for first evaluation
Database transaction boundaries observable in integration harness
steps: Trigger getMyEligibility for a registration without prior certificate_eligibilities row
Verify row creation aligns with evaluation outcome
cases.expected: certificate_eligibilities row appears with matching result and reason in same transaction boundary per module breakdown section 4; no partial writes on failure

cases.title: GET eligibility/me returns synchronous actionable result payload
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant who submitted mandatory feedback
Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me
Inspect response latency and body completeness
cases.expected: Synchronous HTTP 200 with result, reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt in one response; client receives immediate eligibility outcome without polling
